V · WHAT WORKED — NVDA triple: AMD demand validation, Huang AF-1 signal, H200 approval materialized, SOXX dip = gift entry, institutional floor 37/37 Buy, AMAT/CSCO confirmed cycle
VI · WHAT DIDN'T — BRENT short: 'piece of garbage' rejection; Sledgehammer escalation; IEA structural deficit through Oct; 4M bbl/day gap; Citi end-May wrong 3 weeks running

VIII · KEY LEVELS — NVDA $250/$272 bull targets; BRENT $100 deal / $115 spike; TNX 4.5% hike trigger; SPX 7,501 ATH retest
